title: TBSE Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TBSE Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TBSE 12th Result 2026 declared on May 8 at 12 noon. Students can check Tripura Class 12 result online at tbresults.tripura.gov.in and tbse.tripura.gov.in using roll number and registration number.

content.text: The Tripura Board of Secondary Education (TBSE) 12th Result 2026 announced on May 8, 2026 at 12:00 PM for students of the science, commerce, and arts streams. More than 50,000 students are waiting for the Tripura Board Higher Secondary result, which available online on the official website, tbse.tripura.gov.in, using the roll number and registration number mentioned on the admit card. Once released, students can check their scorecard and download the result from the official TBSE portal.

Tripura Board declare the TBSE 12th Result 2026 for all streams on May 8 at 12 noon. The HS result 2026 released online on the official result portal, where students can access their scorecards using their login credentials. The online result will include subject-wise marks and the qualifying status of each student.

Tripura Board has activated the direct link to check TBSE 12th Result 2026 for HS Science, Commerce, and Arts streams. Students can easily access their results online using their roll number and registration details. Use the direct link provided below to view and download your marksheet instantly.

items: Visit the official result website - tbresults.tripura.gov.in
Click on the link for TBSE 12th Result 2026
Enter your roll number and registration number
Your TBSE HS result will appear on the screen
Download and print the result for future reference
